title: Yirinatek Sisal Dart Board Cabinet Sets, Professional Dart Boards Set [12*Steel Darts] - Wooden Dartboard Cabinet with Integrated Scoreboard for Family Game Rooms
features: [SEAMLESSLY BLENDS WITH YOUR DECOR] The stylish Sisal Dart Board Cabinet Set has an elegant, artful design that complements any indoor decor. With its classic finish, it fits effortlessly into any room, adding a touch of sophistication. The excellent craftsmanship on this Dart Board Set also elevates your home decor, making it a fantastic option for indoor games and an attractive addition to a man cave or basement.
[EASY-ASSAMBLY] Quick and hassle-free installation: the Yirinatek Dart Boards can be mounted in just one second after measuring and securing the nails. It includes built-in holders for up to 6 darts.

[SELF-HEALING SISAL FIBER] The Dartboard Cabinet is made from high-density sisal fiber, which naturally self-heals to ensure long-lasting durability, with no noticeable holes after shooting. Equipped with a heavy-duty steel spider frame for enhanced durability.

[EXTENDED LIFESPAN] A rotating steel number ring enhances durability, while the heavy-duty steel spider web ensures the lasting performance of the Darts & Dartboards. Close the Dart Board Cabinets doors to keep it concealed, maintaining a neat space and protecting your darts.

[ACCESSORIES INCLUDED] The Professional Dart Board with Cabinet includes 12 steel-tip darts, ideal for daily use by players of all skill levels. Not suitable for children aged 13 or under. Among the 12 free darts, there are two types of barrels and four different flight designs, allowing each player to easily identify their own darts during the game.
